title: Management API
description: Inspect, retry, pause, and delete jobs and queues programmatically

blocks.text: HoundManagement provides a programmatic interface to inspect and control jobs and queues. It uses the same storage backend as Hound and can be used standalone or alongside a running instance.

rows: List all jobs, optionally filtered by queue or status
Remove a job and all its state keys
Fire a delayed or waiting job immediately
Freeze a job by pushing its delay to max
List all queues with name, paused flag, and length
Get waiting / delayed / processing / completed / failed counts
Stop the processor from claiming new jobs from this queue
Resume processing for a paused queue
Destructive: flush all jobs and state from the queue
Returns true if the queue is currently active

blocks.text: reset() is destructive and irreversible. It removes all jobs in the queue including completed and failed records.
Subscribe to real-time job completion events via mgmt.events.job. Each subscription returns an unsubscribe function:
